name: DML - Select FHI PHI and PBC Stats

content.query:
/* Count of Agents */

SELECT 
'FHI' as OpCo
,count(distinct emp.id) as AgentCount
,emp.Active
 FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_cls_calls] cls
 ,[ODS].[LP_FHI_emp_Employees] emp
 where 
 cls.emp_id = emp.id
 group BY
 emp.Active
 UNION
 SELECT 
'PHI' as OpCo
,count(distinct emp.id) as AgentCount
,emp.Active
 FROM [ODS].[LP_PHI_cls_calls] cls
 ,[ODS].[LP_PHI_emp_Employees] emp
 where 
 cls.emp_id = emp.id
 group BY
 emp.Active
 UNION
 SELECT 
'PBC' as OpCo
,count(distinct emp.id) as AgentCount
,emp.Active
 FROM [ODS].[LP_PBC_cls_calls] cls
 ,[ODS].[LP_PBC_emp_Employees] emp
 where 
 cls.emp_id = emp.id
 group BY
 emp.Active

/* Count of Agents */

 SELECT 
'FHI' as OpCo
,count(distinct emp.id) as SalesRepCount
,emp.Active
 FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_lds_Leads] lds
 ,[ODS].[LP_FHI_emp_Employees] emp
 where 
 lds.slr_id = emp.id
 group BY
 emp.Active

UNION

 SELECT 
'PBC' as OpCo
,count(distinct emp.id) as SalesRepCount
,emp.Active
 FROM [ODS].[LP_PBC_lds_Leads] lds
 ,[ODS].[LP_PBC_emp_Employees] emp
 where 
 lds.slr_id = emp.id
 group BY
 emp.Active

UNION

 SELECT 
'PHI' as OpCo
,count(distinct emp.id) as SalesRepCount
,emp.Active
 FROM [ODS].[LP_PHI_lds_Leads] lds
 ,[ODS].[LP_PHI_emp_Employees] emp
 where 
 lds.slr_id = emp.id
 group BY
 emp.Active

/* Count of Installers */
 
SELECT 
'FHI' as OpCo
,count(1) as InstallerCount
,[Active]
FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_ins_installers]
group by [Active]
union
SELECT 
'PHI' as OpCo
,count(1) as InstallerCount
,[Active]
FROM [dbo].[LP_PHI_ins_installers]
group by [Active]
union
SELECT 
'PBC' as OpCo
,count(1) as InstallerCount
,[Active]
FROM [dbo].[LP_PBC_ins_installers]
group by [Active]
